svg.title: Schemas Tab Flowchart
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full data flow of the Schemas tab — page load, register schema, delete schema, and quick fill paths.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when the Schemas tab loads?')
sendPrompt('What does loadSchemas() do in detail?')
sendPrompt('How does the schema list render in the UI?')
sendPrompt('How do the quick fill buttons work?')
sendPrompt('What happens after quick fill inserts JSON into the textarea?')
sendPrompt('What does the user fill in to register a schema?')
sendPrompt('What does the Register button trigger?')
sendPrompt('What error is shown when JSON is invalid?')
sendPrompt('What does POST /schemas do on the server?')
sendPrompt('How is the schema saved to SQLite?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a schema is saved successfully?')
sendPrompt('What happens when you click delete on a schema?')
sendPrompt('What does DELETE /schemas/:name do on the server?')
sendPrompt('How is the schema removed from SQLite?')
